hero.name: Gatee Gala
hero.bio: I'm a marketing and communications professional with 4+ years of experience at the intersection of music, live events, and digital. I build campaigns, partnerships, and programmes that create genuine moments for audiences — from South Asia's first profitable music industry conference to scaling a platform's entire digital presence.

about.label: About me
about.title: The story so far
paragraphs: From scaling a music distribution platform's entire social strategy in Mumbai to leading South Asia's first profitable music industry conference as a one-person team, I work best when the stakes are real and the brief is ambitious.
My background spans the music industry, live events, brand partnerships, and digital campaign delivery — with a deep personal connection to music and community that shows up in everything I make.
MSc Management Marketing, University of Bristol (Merit). Bristol Plus Award — attained by fewer than 3% of students. Based in Bristol, open to London and the North.

cases.title: RISE//DEL 2026 — Sponsorship & Partnerships
cases.description: As sole Project Lead for RISE//DEL — a 3-day multidisciplinary conference in Delhi/Gurgaon — I owned the full commercial partnerships strategy from outreach to activation, delivering 250% of target and driving the first ever profitable edition.

cases.title: The TuneCore Grant
cases.description: In 2022, I conceived and established TuneCore India's Artist Grant from scratch — framework, criteria, application process, and comms — while simultaneously overhauling the brand's entire multi-channel strategy. The Grant runs annually to this day.

cases.title: Represent Management — Anuv Jain on TikTok
cases.description: Anuv Jain — 3.4M YouTube subscribers, Forbes 30 Under 30, #1 on Spotify India. His TikTok hadn't kept pace. I built a platform-native content strategy that converted passive listeners into an active community for an intimate, acoustic artist.

cases.title: JetSynthesys — Anime in India Research
cases.description: Led a published market study on India's anime fandom — combining focus groups, a 200-person survey, and 20+ source analysis. The findings shaped JetSynthesys's IP strategy and were instrumental in securing the Pokémon Asia partnership.

items.text: Gatee proved she was someone I could rely on — not just to execute tasks well, but to take genuine responsibility for major parts of the project. She managed key relationships across partners and stakeholders with maturity, initiative and calm. Her contribution to RISE//DEL was significant. I would recommend her without hesitation.
items.name: Aayush Bansal

items.text: Gatee brought a sharp strategic mindset, exceptional focus, and an impressive ability to adapt to the often layered task on hand. What struck me most was her eye on the bigger picture and her willingness to go beyond her core responsibilities for the greater success of the project. Any team would be lucky to have her.
items.name: Heena Kriplani
items.role: Ex Head of South Asia · TuneCore

items.text: Gatee is both creative and strategic in her approach to brand building. She played an instrumental role in setting the tone for TuneCore India's artist-facing brand. She is a natural at social media marketing — and a clear team player. She would be a great asset to any marketing team.
items.name: Akhila Shankar
items.role: Head of South Asia · TuneCore / Artist Services Director · Believe
